programs.title: Live PD Presents: PD Cam
programs.desc: Altercation in a hospital waiting room; shootout on the streets of San Francisco; suspected DUI ends in juggling.

programs.title: Live PD Presents: PD Cam
programs.desc: An officer is shot during a DWI stop in New Mexico; police respond to shots fired at an apartment complex; an officer is the first to respond to a house fire.

programs.title: Live PD Presents: PD Cam
programs.desc: State troopers respond to reports of a vehicle driving erratically; Florida deputies conduct a car search during a traffic stop; officers in Ohio respond to an overdose call.

programs.title: Live PD Presents: PD Cam
programs.desc: A woman steals a police SUV; shootout on the streets of Denver; a fleeing robbery suspect collides with a deputy's vehicle.

programs.title: Live PD Presents: PD Cam
programs.desc: Shoplifter fires at police during pursuit; Florida deputies and K-9 look for drugs during traffic stop; police rescue children from roof.

programs.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programs.desc: From tangled brush to pitch-black streets, these K9s sniff out danger with precision; after a tense pursuit, K9 Eddie corners a suspect hiding deep in a ravine; across the country, K9 Streeter makes a heart-stopping leap; K9 Riggs corners a double murder suspect; K9 Diesel kicks off his late-night shift by chasing down a hit-and-run perp.
